text: on-call handoff notes are in the usual doc, quiet week, one paging alert (false positive, tuned it)
TIL our bundle is 40% moment.js. removing it, ACME-255
if you touch the billing service read the escalation matrix on Confluence first, billing bugs page people at 3am
whats the difference between `make deploy` and `make ship`? asking before i break something
`make ship` = deploy + migrations + cache flush. `make deploy` is code only. 99% of the time you want ship
